subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! Sow thou a seed that the plant of love and constancy may spring forth, and adorn the rose-garden of affection and purity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء تخمی بپاش که گیاه مهر و وفا بروید و گلزار محبت و صفا بیاراید چشمه
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @spiritual transformation, @unity in diversity, @war and peace, @power of love, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
